title: Intent Classification Result
description: Platform-level schema for an interaction intent classification result. See docs/intent-classification.md for full semantics, platform enumeration, and extension rules.

intent.description: Classified interaction intent. Must be a value from the platform minimum enumeration or an instance-declared extension. Platform minimum set: question, correction, constraint, scope-change, protocol-change, approval, rejection, request-for-writeback, issue-report, implementation, unknown, ambiguous.

confidence.description: Classification confidence level. 'unknown' means the AI cannot determine confidence.

explanation.description: Brief explanation of the classification result. Recommended when confidence is not 'high'.

high_impact.description: Whether this intent is classified as high-impact. When true, PDP must not output 'inform' as gate_level without an explicit override rule.

alternatives.description: Candidate intent list. Recommended when intent is 'ambiguous' or confidence is 'low'.

corrected_by.description: Identifier of the human who corrected the AI classification. Present only after a correction.

original_intent.description: The AI's original classification before human correction. Present only after a correction.
